source: Consolidation arc CONS-3 (Ruling 2 -- the prose restoration): agentm's per-repo overlay, resolved via rule_pack.py's existing --wiki-root scope. Re-declares two shipped rule ids to record a reviewed, honest term-of-art carve-out rather than an implicit one -- severity is unchanged from the shipped pack (both are already suggestion-tier, which never fails --strict), so this file documents a decision, it does not relax the gate.

rules.hint: agentm-ratified term-of-art carve-out (CONSOLIDATION-VERDICT.md, Ruling 2, 2026-07-10): this codebase uses "load-bearing" precisely to name a real structural dependency (a design's own load-bearing assumption, a gate protecting a live invariant), not AI-tell peacocking. Genuine slop uses of the word still get reworded by the CONS-3 sweep (task 4) -- this carve-out covers the surviving, reviewed technical uses only.

agentm-ratified term-of-art carve-out (CONSOLIDATION-VERDICT.md, Ruling 2, 2026-07-10): this codebase uses "first-class" precisely in technical/design prose (a first-class capability, a first-class citizen of a resolver), not AI-tell peacocking. Genuine slop uses of the word still get reworded by the CONS-3 sweep (task 4) -- this carve-out covers the surviving, reviewed technical uses only.
